name: GOLFTEC Timonium
about: GOLFTEC Timonium is a premium golf training studio that focuses on data-driven instruction using advanced technology. The venue utilizes OPTIMOTION motion measurement systems and high-speed video analysis to provide players with precise feedback on their swings. Lessons are tailored to individual goals, with certified coaches developing personalized improvement plans that focus on mechanics, strategy, and on-course performance. The facility is designed for focused practice and skill development, offering a controlled environment for golfers to improve their game through technology and expert coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides precise swing data and feedback
Personalized coaching with PGA-certified instructors creates tailored improvement strategies
On-course lessons help apply swing improvements to real-world playing conditions

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club and ball tracking data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides equipment for lessons and fittings, but you can bring your own clubs if preferred. Club fittings use their technology to match you with the best equipment from top brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC does not mention food and beverage service on-site, so it is recommended to check with the location directly. The focus is on golf instruction and practice with a pro shop available for equipment purchases.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: While exact timing isn't specified, simulator sessions are typically shorter than real golf. Lesson and practice times vary based on the program, with focus on skill development rather than completing full rounds.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, with technology and coaching designed to help younger players improve their game in a supportive environment.
